raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I was scammed by a merchant posing as a legitimate vendor for the XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. The tickets I purchased were entirely unusable, and I am requesting that Citi reopen my dispute and issue a refund for the {$230.00} I was charged. 

Here is a detailed account of what occurred : XXXX. Before the incident, I had already purchased valid tickets for the XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX tour through the official website, XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  and was set to use these tickets on the specified day. 

XXXX. Upon exiting the subway, I was approached by an individual who misled me into purchasing XXXX additional tickets. They claimed that it was too late to use the official tickets I had already bought, and assured me that my original tickets would be refunded. Believing they were affiliated with the same organization, I agreed to purchase the additional tickets, which were printed for me on the spot. I have attached XXXX to this email. 

XXXX. After purchasing the tickets, I was instructed to follow another person to a separate location to board a bus for the tour. However, after waiting for some time, the individual left, and I was denied access to the bus. It soon became clear that the tickets I had purchased were fraudulent and not affiliated with the official tour in any way. 

XXXX. I later discovered that my original tickets, purchased from XXXXXXXX XXXX were still valid and could be used for the ferry. I successfully used these tickets to complete the tour, realizing that the scammers had no connection to the official event and that the tickets they sold me were worthless. 

XXXX. After this, I immediately filed a dispute with the credit card bank on the same day, but the dispute was denied on XX/XX/year>. 

It is intolerable for Citi to reverse the charge for this fraudulent merchant without conducting a proper investigation. The vendor engaged in fraudulent activity, and allowing them to retain my funds without consequence is unacceptable. I am requesting that Citi reopen this dispute and issue a refund for the {$230.00} I was charged for the fraudulent tickets.
